name: Analytics export path and product hardening follow-up
description: Extend the analytics surface beyond an on-screen dashboard by adding a deliberate export/snapshot path and the surrounding product hardening needed for users to trust analytics outputs operationally. This follow-up should align the analytics experience more closely with the product spec by treating the dashboard as a source for both insight consumption and portable reporting. Scope should remain disciplined: strengthen exportability, consistency, and user-facing completeness without drifting into forecasting or second-phase analytics ambitions.
